self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Wildling Nightstar: every 10s the wielder gains 24/30/36/42/48% (R1/R3/R5) of their own Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK for 12s. Auto-applied from the wielder's own live EM, selected by the leaderboard's chosen refinement for this weapon (main-weapon-pool selection).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Wildling Nightstar (support use, assumes R5): nearby party members gain 30% of the wielder's Wildling Nightstar buff (=14.4% of the wielder's EM) as flat ATK. Type the support wielder's actual EM into this condition's input for an exact value; the checkbox-only fallback assumes 800 EM.
